releaseNotes:
• Fix: streams that open successfully but never produce a frame now give up in ~watchdog seconds instead of waiting ~30 s for mpv's internal timeout. A startup watchdog now covers the open→first-frame gap in both full-screen and multi-view.
• Fix: open-failure retries now respect the Max Reconnect Attempts setting instead of a separate hardcoded limit of 6. All failure modes — open() throwing, stream dropping, and startup stall — now share one counter and one setting.
• Default Max Reconnect Attempts changed from 6 to 3 (existing stored values are kept; only fresh installs and Settings Reset get 3).
• Buffering settings help text rewritten: each entry now explains what the setting controls, how changing it affects behaviour, and which other settings it interacts with.
